jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - IndiGrid - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? IndiGrid in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!
